items.reasoning: Sustain through Frost Arrows + Shrapnel chip damage from two ranged heroes.
+2 armor against Drow and Sniper physical right-clicks. Both deal only physical.
Centaur needs last hits from range using Double Edge; QB for melee creeps.
STR stats increase Double Edge nuke damage and HP pool.
Reduces Double Edge self-damage from 300 to ~180; also gives HP regen for lane sustain.
Critical movement speed to close gap on Drow's Frost Arrow slow.
Cheap HP for surviving Drow Marksmanship proc damage; doubles stats at 25 min.
Blink + Stomp closes the kiting gap instantly. 2.0s stun on both ranged heroes.
Damage block reduces Sniper headshot procs and Drow right-clicks. Centaur needs to survive kite damage.
5000+ HP with Stampede active = unkillable initiator. Return damage scales with Centaur's massive HP pool.
Armor aura protects team from Drow Marksmanship armor reduction. -5 armor on enemies.
Blink upgrade deals 150% STR damage on landing. Centaur's 3500+ HP = 5250 AoE damage.
Drow and Sniper deal high single-target DPS -- Blade Mail reflects it all during Stomp followup.
Stampede becomes BKB-piercing stun on contact. Gap-closer for entire team.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Centaur is the anti-kite hero. Blink Dagger eliminates the range advantage that Drow and Sniper rely on. Stomp + Double Edge combo one-shots supports and chunks carries. Stampede gives the entire team a gap-closer against the kite-heavy lineup. Stack HP for Return damage.
